# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR: "ci-scripts"
  SCRIPT_TIMEOUT: "3600"
  MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE: "1048576"

.security_checks:
  before_script:
    - |
      # Validate script exists in allowed directory
      if [ ! -f "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}" ]; then
        echo "Error: Script ${SCRIPT_NAME} not found in ${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      # Check script size to prevent resource abuse
      SCRIPT_SIZE=$(stat -f%z "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}")
      if [ "${SCRIPT_SIZE}" -gt "${MAX_SCRIPT_SIZE}" ]; then
        echo "Error: Script size exceeds maximum allowed size"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      # Verify script has no dangerous patterns
      if grep -E '(curl.*\||wget.*\||eval|exec|source /|\.\ /|import os|subprocess|system\()' "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}"; then
        echo "Warning: Script contains potentially dangerous commands"
      fi
    - |
      # Check script is tracked in git
      if ! git ls-files --error-unmatch "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "Error: Script must be tracked in git repository"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      # Verify script hasn't been modified in current pipeline
      if git diff --name-only HEAD | grep -q "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}"; then
        echo "Error: Script has been modified in this commit. Review required."
        exit 1
      fi
    - chmod +x "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}"

validate_scripts:
  stage: validate
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  script:
    - |
      echo "Validating all scripts in ${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}"
      if [ ! -d "${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}" ]; then
        echo "Error: ${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR} directory not found"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      # Ensure scripts directory is not empty
      if [ -z "$(ls -A ${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR})" ]; then
        echo "Error: No scripts found in ${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}"
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      # Validate each script
      for script in ${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*; do
        if [ -f "$script" ]; then
          echo "Checking $script"
          # Check for shebang
          if ! head -n 1 "$script" | grep -q '^#!'; then
            echo "Warning: $script missing shebang"
          fi
          # Check file permissions
          if [ -x "$script" ]; then
            echo "Note: $script is executable"
          fi
        fi
      done
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests
    - tags

build_custom:
  stage: build
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  variables:
    SCRIPT_NAME: "build.sh"
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - target/
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success
  timeout: 2h
  retry:
    max: 2
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests
    - tags

test_unit:
  stage: test
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  variables:
    SCRIPT_NAME: "test-unit.sh"
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: test-results/*.xml
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
    expire_in: 1 week
  coverage: '/TOTAL.*\s+(\d+%)$/'
  timeout: 1h
  dependencies:
    - build_custom
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests
    - tags

test_integration:
  stage: test
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  variables:
    SCRIPT_NAME: "test-integration.sh"
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  artifacts:
    reports:
      junit: integration-results/*.xml
    paths:
      - integration-results/
    expire_in: 1 week
  timeout: 2h
  dependencies:
    - build_custom
  allow_failure: false
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests
    - tags

security_scan:
  stage: test
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  script:
    - |
      echo "Running security scans on scripts"
      for script in ${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*; do
        if [ -f "$script" ]; then
          echo "Scanning $script for security issues"
          # Check for hardcoded secrets
          if grep -iE '(password|secret|token|api_key|private_key).*=.*["\047]' "$script"; then
            echo "ERROR: Potential hardcoded credentials found in $script"
            exit 1
          fi
          # Check for unsafe commands
          if grep -E '(rm -rf /|dd if=|mkfs|fdisk|:(){ :|:& };:)' "$script"; then
            echo "ERROR: Dangerous commands found in $script"
            exit 1
          fi
        fi
      done
  allow_failure: false
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests
    - tags

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  variables:
    SCRIPT_NAME: "deploy-staging.sh"
    DEPLOY_ENV: "staging"
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
    on_stop: cleanup_staging
  dependencies:
    - build_custom
  timeout: 1h
  only:
    - develop
    - /^release\/.*$/
  when: manual

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  variables:
    SCRIPT_NAME: "deploy-production.sh"
    DEPLOY_ENV: "production"
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
    on_stop: cleanup_production
  dependencies:
    - build_custom
  timeout: 1h
  only:
    - main
    - master
    - /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/
  when: manual

cleanup_staging:
  stage: deploy
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  variables:
    SCRIPT_NAME: "cleanup-staging.sh"
    DEPLOY_ENV: "staging"
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  environment:
    name: staging
    action: stop
  when: manual
  only:
    - develop
    - /^release\/.*$/

cleanup_production:
  stage: deploy
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  variables:
    SCRIPT_NAME: "cleanup-production.sh"
    DEPLOY_ENV: "production"
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  environment:
    name: production
    action: stop
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - master
    - /^v\d+\.\d+\.\d+$/

custom_job_template:
  tags:
    - shared-runner
  extends: .security_checks
  script:
    - timeout ${SCRIPT_TIMEOUT} ./${ALLOWED_SCRIPTS_DIR}/${SCRIPT_NAME}
  timeout: 1h
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_TAG'
